frame_eqs_str: a['vol_now']=((0.4*a['bass'])+(0.1*((a['bass_att']+a['treb'])+a['mid']))); a['vol_mean']=((Math.abs(equal(mod(a['frame'],50), 0))>0.00001)?((a['vol_mean']-(0.5*(a['vol_mean']-a['vol_now'])))):((0.1*((a['vol_mean']*9)+a['vol_now'])))); a['q1']=(a['vol_now']*0.07); a['q2']=((Math.abs(above(a['vol_now'], (1.2*a['vol_mean'])))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['slowtime']=(a['slowtime']+(a['q2']*a['time'])); a['myr']=(((-1*Math.cos(a['slowtime']))+Math.abs((-1*Math.cos(a['slowtime']))))+(0.2*(Math.cos(Math.sin(a['slowtime']))+(Math.abs(Math.cos(Math.sin(a['slowtime'])))+Math.cos(Math.sin(a['slowtime'])))))); a['myg']=Math.abs(Math.sin(a['slowtime'])); a['myb']=(Math.cos(a['slowtime'])+Math.abs(Math.cos(a['slowtime']))); a['q3']=((Math.abs(above(a['myr'], 1))>0.00001)?(1):(((Math.abs(above(a['myr'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.abs(a['myr'])):(0)))); a['q4']=((Math.abs(above(a['myg'], 1))>0.00001)?(1):(((Math.abs(above(a['myg'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.abs(a['myg'])):(0)))); a['q5']=((Math.abs(above(a['myb'], 1))>0.00001)?(1):(((Math.abs(above(a['myb'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.abs(a['myb'])):(0)))); a['q6']=(1-((Math.abs(above(a['myr'], 1))>0.00001)?(1):(((Math.abs(above(a['myr'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.abs(a['myr'])):(0))))); a['q7']=(1-((Math.abs(above(a['myg'], 1))>0.00001)?(1):(((Math.abs(above(a['myg'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.abs(a['myg'])):(0))))); a['q8']=(1-((Math.abs(above(a['myb'], 1))>0.00001)?(1):(((Math.abs(above(a['myb'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.abs(a['myb'])):(0))))); a['monitor']=a['q4'];
